# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.

})()"

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"
1. Feuer sollten gegen die Windrichtung angegriffen werden. -- WRONG (training says "in Windrichtung" = downwind, not against it)
2. Nach Aktivierung eines Feuerlöschers hänge ich ihn wieder an den Platz zurück, wo er entnommen wurde. -- WRONG (activated extinguishers must be refilled/replaced, not hung back)
3. Es ist sinnvoll, mehrere Feuerlöscher gleichzeitig im Einsatz zu nutzen. -- CORRECT (multiple extinguishers simultaneously is effective)
4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

The drop zones aren't showing up clearly. Let me use a different approach -- look at all elements in the drop area (right side near the fire class icons).
# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;

  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');

  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();

        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

**Tool:** bash

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT

      r.push('y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' id=' + inp.id);
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"
1. Feuer sollten gegen die Windrichtung angegriffen werden. -- WRONG (training says "in Windrichtung" = downwind, not against it)
2. Nach Aktivierung eines Feuerlöschers hänge ich ihn wieder an den Platz zurück, wo er entnommen wurde. -- WRONG (activated extinguishers must be refilled/replaced, not hung back)
3. Es ist sinnvoll, mehrere Feuerlöscher gleichzeitig im Einsatz zu nutzen. -- CORRECT (multiple extinguishers simultaneously is effective)
4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q4: "WAS DÜRFEN SIE BEI BRANDSCHUTZTÜREN AUF KEINEN FALL MACHEN?"
1. Aufkeilen -- CORRECT (training explicitly says "aufgekeilte Brandschutztüren" increase fire spread risk)
2. Verstellen -- CORRECT (blocking fire doors prevents them from closing)
3. Festbinden -- CORRECT (tying fire doors open prevents them from closing)

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

The drop zones aren't showing up clearly. Let me use a different approach -- look at all elements in the drop area (right side near the fire class icons).
# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;

        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  var lines = text.split('\\n').filter(function(l){ return l.includes('Mischungsverhältnis'); });
  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und
# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"
1. Sobald der Alarm ausgeht, darf ich wieder ins Gebäude und weiterarbeiten. -- WRONG (you must wait for instructions)
2. Ich warte Anweisungen der Feuerwehr oder der Einsatzleitung ab. -- CORRECT
3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

The drop zones aren't showing up clearly. Let me use a different approach -- look at all elements in the drop area (right side near the fire class icons).
# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

**Tool:** bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "# Get exact positions of draggable items and drop zones in iframe coordinates\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var iRect = iframe.getBoundingClientRect();\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  \n  // Get draggable items (yellow boxes)\n  var drags = [];\n  var texts = ['Brennbare Metalle', 'Verbrennung mit Glutbildung', 'Brände von Gasen', 'flüssiger', 'Speiseölen'];\n  var allEls = doc.querySelectorAll('*');\n  for (var el of allEls) {\n    if (el.offsetWidth > 200 && el.offsetWidth < 280 && el.offsetHeight > 25 && el.offsetHeight < 50) {\n      var t = el.textContent.trim();\n      for (var key of texts) {\n        if (t.includes(key) && el.children.length <= 3) {\n          var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n          drags.push('DRAG: \\\"' + t.substring(0,40) + '\\\" iframe_cx=' + Math.round(r.x + r.width/2) + ' iframe_cy=' + Math.round(r.y + r.height/2) + ' page_cx=' + Math.round(iRect.x + r.x + r.width/2) + ' page_cy=' + Math.round(iRect.y + r.y + r.height/2));\n          break;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n  \n  // Get drop zones (empty areas next to fire class icons)\n  var drops = [];\n  var imgs = doc.querySelectorAll('img[id^=\\\"acc-\\\"]');\n  for (var img of imgs) {\n    var ir = img.getBoundingClientRect();\n    if (ir.width > 40 && ir.width < 70 && ir.y > 200) {\n      drops.push('DROP: img_y=' + Math.round(ir.y) + ' img_cy=' + Math.round(ir.y + ir.height/2) + ' page_drop_x=' + Math.round(iRect.x + ir.x + ir.width + 170) + ' page_drop_y=' + Math.round(iRect.y + ir.y + ir.height/2));\n    }\n  }\n  \n  return 'iframe: x=' + Math.round(iRect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(iRect.y) + '\\\\n' + drags.join('\\\\n') + '\\\\n---\\\\n' + drops.join('\\\\n');\n})()\"",
  "description": "Get drag and drop coordinates",
  "timeout": 10000
}
```

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

The drop zones aren't showing up clearly. Let me use a different approach -- look at all elements in the drop area (right side near the fire class icons).
# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

{
  "command": "# Get all draggable items - search for yellow box elements more broadly\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var iRect = iframe.getBoundingClientRect();\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  \n  // Find elements that contain the answer texts\n  var keywords = ['Brennbare Metalle', 'Verbrennung mit Glutbildung', 'Brände von Gasen', 'Brände flüssiger', 'Brände von Speiseölen'];\n  var r = [];\n  \n  for (var kw of keywords) {\n    var found = false;\n    var allEls = doc.querySelectorAll('*');\n    for (var el of allEls) {\n      var t = el.textContent.trim();\n      if (t.includes(kw) && el.offsetWidth > 100 && el.offsetHeight > 20) {\n        var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();\n        // Look for the actual draggable container (should be ~262px wide, ~35px high)\n        if (rect.width > 200 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 25 && rect.height < 70 && rect.x > 200 && rect.x < 500) {\n          r.push('DRAG: \\\"' + kw + '\\\" ifr_cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' ifr_cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' pg_cx=' + Math.round(iRect.x + rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' pg_cy=' + Math.round(iRect.y + rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName);\n          found = true;\n          break;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n    if (!found) r.push('NOT FOUND: ' + kw);\n  }\n  return r.join('\\\\n');\n})()\"",
  "description": "Find all 5 draggable items",
  "timeout": 10000
}

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  var lines = text.split('\\n').filter(function(l){ return l.includes('Mischungsverhältnis'); });
  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"
1. Sobald der Alarm ausgeht, darf ich wieder ins Gebäude und weiterarbeiten. -- WRONG (you must wait for instructions)
2. Ich warte Anweisungen der Feuerwehr oder der Einsatzleitung ab. -- CORRECT
3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.

    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

Click to expand
# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"
1. Sobald der Alarm ausgeht, darf ich wieder ins Gebäude und weiterarbeiten. -- WRONG (you must wait for instructions)
2. Ich warte Anweisungen der Feuerwehr oder der Einsatzleitung ab. -- CORRECT
3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.
# Get Q2 checkbox input IDs
$ # Get the checkbox input IDs for Q2

  for (var inp of inputs) {
    var rect = inp.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width > 200 && rect.y > 200) {
      r.push('y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' id=' + inp.id);
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"
1. Feuer sollten gegen die Windrichtung angegriffen werden. -- WRONG (training says "in Windrichtung" = downwind, not against it)
2. Nach Aktivierung eines Feuerlöschers hänge ich ihn wieder an den Platz zurück, wo er entnommen wurde. -- WRONG (activated extinguishers must be refilled/replaced, not hung back)
3. Es ist sinnvoll, mehrere Feuerlöscher gleichzeitig im Einsatz zu nutzen. -- CORRECT (multiple extinguishers simultaneously is effective)
4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q4: "WAS DÜRFEN SIE BEI BRANDSCHUTZTÜREN AUF KEINEN FALL MACHEN?"
1. Aufkeilen -- CORRECT (training explicitly says "aufgekeilte Brandschutztüren" increase fire spread risk)
2. Verstellen -- CORRECT (blocking fire doors prevents them from closing)
3. Festbinden -- CORRECT (tying fire doors open prevents them from closing)

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

{
  "command": "# Use JavaScript to simulate drag-and-drop within the iframe\n# We need to dispatch mouse events on the iframe elements\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  // Helper to simulate drag from one point to another within the iframe\n  function simulateDrag(fromX, fromY, toX, toY) {\n    var fromEl = doc.elementFromPoint(fromX, fromY);\n    if (!fromEl) return 'no element at (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ')';\n    \n    var mousedown = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX, clientY: fromY, view: win});\n    var mousemove1 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX + 5, clientY: fromY + 5, view: win});\n    var mousemove2 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    var mouseup = new MouseEvent('mouseup', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    \n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousedown);\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove1);\n    \n    var toEl = doc.elementFromPoint(toX, toY) || fromEl;\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove2);\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mouseup);\n    \n    return 'dragged from (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ') tag=' + fromEl.tagName + ' to (' + toX + ',' + toY + ') tag=' + toEl.tagName;\n  }\n  \n  // Drag 1: Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (ifr_cx=438, ifr_cy=334) -> A drop zone (near img at y=269, right side ~885)\n  var r1 = simulateDrag(438, 334, 885, 269);\n  return r1;\n})()\"",
  "description": "Simulate drag Glutbildung to A",
  "timeout": 10000
}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();

        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"
1. Sobald der Alarm ausgeht, darf ich wieder ins Gebäude und weiterarbeiten. -- WRONG (you must wait for instructions)
2. Ich warte Anweisungen der Feuerwehr oder der Einsatzleitung ab. -- CORRECT
3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.

})()"

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"
1. Feuer sollten gegen die Windrichtung angegriffen werden. -- WRONG (training says "in Windrichtung" = downwind, not against it)
2. Nach Aktivierung eines Feuerlöschers hänge ich ihn wieder an den Platz zurück, wo er entnommen wurde. -- WRONG (activated extinguishers must be refilled/replaced, not hung back)
3. Es ist sinnvoll, mehrere Feuerlöscher gleichzeitig im Einsatz zu nutzen. -- CORRECT (multiple extinguishers simultaneously is effective)
4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

{
  "command": "# Drag 2: \"Brände flüssiger...\" (438,454) -> B drop zone (885,333)\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  function simulateDrag(fromX, fromY, toX, toY) {\n    var fromEl = doc.elementFromPoint(fromX, fromY);\n    if (!fromEl) return 'no element at (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ')';\n    \n    var mousedown = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX, clientY: fromY, view: win});\n    var mousemove1 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX + 5, clientY: fromY + 5, view: win});\n    var mousemove2 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    var mouseup = new MouseEvent('mouseup', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    \n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousedown);\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove1);\n    var toEl = doc.elementFromPoint(toX, toY) || fromEl;\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove2);\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mouseup);\n    \n    return 'dragged ' + fromEl.tagName + ' to ' + toEl.tagName;\n  }\n  \n  return simulateDrag(438, 454, 885, 333);\n})()\"",

}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"
