# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

{
  "command": "sleep 1\n# Drag 3: \"Brände von Gasen\" (438,394) -> C drop zone (885,397)\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  function simulateDrag(fromX, fromY, toX, toY) {\n    var fromEl = doc.elementFromPoint(fromX, fromY);\n    if (!fromEl) return 'no element at (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ')';\n    var mousedown = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX, clientY: fromY, view: win});\n    var mousemove1 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX + 5, clientY: fromY + 5, view: win});\n    var mousemove2 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    var mouseup = new MouseEvent('mouseup', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousedown);\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove1);\n    var toEl = doc.elementFromPoint(toX, toY) || fromEl;\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove2);\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mouseup);\n    return 'dragged ' + fromEl.tagName + ' to ' + toEl.tagName;\n  }\n  \n  return simulateDrag(438, 394, 885, 397);\n})()\"",
  "description": "Drag Gasen to C",
  "timeout": 10000
}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

{
  "command": "sleep 1\n# Drag 4: \"Brennbare Metalle\" (438,274) -> D drop zone (885,460)\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  function simulateDrag(fromX, fromY, toX, toY) {\n    var fromEl = doc.elementFromPoint(fromX, fromY);\n    if (!fromEl) return 'no element at (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ')';\n    var mousedown = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX, clientY: fromY, view: win});\n    var mousemove1 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX + 5, clientY: fromY + 5, view: win});\n    var mousemove2 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    var mouseup = new MouseEvent('mouseup', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousedown);\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove1);\n    var toEl = doc.elementFromPoint(toX, toY) || fromEl;\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove2);\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mouseup);\n    return 'dragged ' + fromEl.tagName + ' to ' + toEl.tagName;\n  }\n  \n  return simulateDrag(438, 274, 885, 460);\n})()\"",
  "description": "Drag Brennbare Metalle to D",
  "timeout": 10000
}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

{
  "command": "sleep 1\n# Drag 5: \"Brände von Speiseölen\" (438,514) -> F drop zone (885,524)\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  function simulateDrag(fromX, fromY, toX, toY) {\n    var fromEl = doc.elementFromPoint(fromX, fromY);\n    if (!fromEl) return 'no element at (' + fromX + ',' + fromY + ')';\n    var mousedown = new MouseEvent('mousedown', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX, clientY: fromY, view: win});\n    var mousemove1 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: fromX + 5, clientY: fromY + 5, view: win});\n    var mousemove2 = new MouseEvent('mousemove', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    var mouseup = new MouseEvent('mouseup', {bubbles: true, cancelable: true, clientX: toX, clientY: toY, view: win});\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousedown);\n    fromEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove1);\n    var toEl = doc.elementFromPoint(toX, toY) || fromEl;\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mousemove2);\n    toEl.dispatchEvent(mouseup);\n    return 'dragged ' + fromEl.tagName + ' to ' + toEl.tagName;\n  }\n  \n  return simulateDrag(438, 514, 885, 524);\n})()\"",

}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';

$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';

$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"
1. Sobald der Alarm ausgeht, darf ich wieder ins Gebäude und weiterarbeiten. -- WRONG (you must wait for instructions)
2. Ich warte Anweisungen der Feuerwehr oder der Einsatzleitung ab. -- CORRECT
3. Ich melde fehlende Personen. -- CORRECT
4. Ich weise alle Personen zum Verlassen der betreffenden Bereiche an. -- CORRECT
5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT
From the training: at the assembly point you report cleared areas, report missing persons, wait for instructions, and direct people to leave. Everything except option 1.

Q3: "WELCHE VORGEHENSWEISEN SIND BEI DER NUTZUNG VON FEUERLÖSCHERN RICHTIG?"
1. Feuer sollten gegen die Windrichtung angegriffen werden. -- WRONG (training says "in Windrichtung" = downwind, not against it)
2. Nach Aktivierung eines Feuerlöschers hänge ich ihn wieder an den Platz zurück, wo er entnommen wurde. -- WRONG (activated extinguishers must be refilled/replaced, not hung back)
3. Es ist sinnvoll, mehrere Feuerlöscher gleichzeitig im Einsatz zu nutzen. -- CORRECT (multiple extinguishers simultaneously is effective)
4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area

        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // Right side area where drop zones should be (x > 550)
      if (rect.x > 550 && rect.y > 230 && rect.y < 550 && rect.width > 50 && rect.height > 15) {
        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

}

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts

gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q2: "WAS IST AM SAMMELPLATZ ZU BEACHTEN?"

5. Ich melde geräumte Bereiche. -- CORRECT

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"
