Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  var lines = text.split('\\n').filter(function(l){ return l.includes('Mischungsverhältnis'); });
  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

  return 'not found';
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();

      // They should be around x=700-900 area

        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

})()"

# Get full answer texts

gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;

})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

  var inputs = doc.querySelectorAll('input[id^=\"acc-\"]');
  var r = [];
  for (var inp of inputs) {
    var rect = inp.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width > 200 && rect.y > 200) {
      r.push('y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' id=' + inp.id);
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

  for (var inp of inputs) {
    var rect = inp.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width > 200 && rect.y > 200) {
      r.push('y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' id=' + inp.id);
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

{
  "command": "# Try to find the Storyline/Articulate player API to set the slider value directly\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  // Check for Storyline player API\n  var apis = [];\n  if (win.GetPlayer) apis.push('GetPlayer');\n  if (win.player) apis.push('player');\n  if (win.SCORM) apis.push('SCORM');\n  if (win.ppSL) apis.push('ppSL');\n  if (win.story) apis.push('story');\n  if (win.DS) apis.push('DS');\n  \n  // Check for Articulate specific globals\n  var keys = Object.keys(win).filter(function(k) {\n    return k.toLowerCase().includes('player') || k.toLowerCase().includes('slide') || k.toLowerCase().includes('story') || k.toLowerCase().includes('articulate');\n  });\n  \n  return 'APIs found: ' + apis.join(', ') + '\\\\nRelevant globals: ' + keys.join(', ');\n})()\"",
  "description": "Find Storyline player API",
  "timeout": 10000
}

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  var lines = text.split('\\n').filter(function(l){ return l.includes('Mischungsverhältnis'); });
  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

{
  "command": "# Try to find the variable through automation or by looking at the slider input element\ngsd-browser eval \"(function(){\n  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\\\"icontent.do\\\"]');\n  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;\n  var win = iframe.contentWindow;\n  \n  // Look at the input element attributes for variable binding\n  var handle = doc.querySelector('#acc-5s4kvFIAn9L');\n  if (!handle) return 'no handle';\n  \n  var attrs = [];\n  for (var i = 0; i < handle.attributes.length; i++) {\n    var a = handle.attributes[i];\n    attrs.push(a.name + '=' + a.value);\n  }\n  \n  // Also check parent elements\n  var parent = handle.parentElement;\n  var parentAttrs = [];\n  while (parent && parent !== doc.body) {\n    for (var i = 0; i < Math.min(parent.attributes.length, 5); i++) {\n      var a = parent.attributes[i];\n      if (a.name.startsWith('data-') || a.name === 'id' || a.name === 'class') {\n        parentAttrs.push(parent.tagName + '.' + a.name + '=' + a.value.substring(0, 50));\n      }\n    }\n    parent = parent.parentElement;\n  }\n  \n  return 'handle attrs: ' + attrs.join(', ') + '\\\\nparent chain: ' + parentAttrs.join(' > ');\n})()\"",
  "description": "Check slider input attributes",
  "timeout": 10000
}
```

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q4: "WAS DÜRFEN SIE BEI BRANDSCHUTZTÜREN AUF KEINEN FALL MACHEN?"
1. Aufkeilen -- CORRECT (training explicitly says "aufgekeilte Brandschutztüren" increase fire spread risk)
2. Verstellen -- CORRECT (blocking fire doors prevents them from closing)
3. Festbinden -- CORRECT (tying fire doors open prevents them from closing)
All three are things you must NEVER do to fire doors. Select all.

    }

  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

}

Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q4: "WAS DÜRFEN SIE BEI BRANDSCHUTZTÜREN AUF KEINEN FALL MACHEN?"
1. Aufkeilen -- CORRECT (training explicitly says "aufgekeilte Brandschutztüren" increase fire spread risk)
2. Verstellen -- CORRECT (blocking fire doors prevents them from closing)
3. Festbinden -- CORRECT (tying fire doors open prevents them from closing)
All three are things you must NEVER do to fire doors. Select all.

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

gsd-browser eval "(function(){

      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

4. Glutnester nachlöschen. -- CORRECT (re-extinguish embers/glowing spots)

Q4: "WAS DÜRFEN SIE BEI BRANDSCHUTZTÜREN AUF KEINEN FALL MACHEN?"
1. Aufkeilen -- CORRECT (training explicitly says "aufgekeilte Brandschutztüren" increase fire spread risk)
2. Verstellen -- CORRECT (blocking fire doors prevents them from closing)
3. Festbinden -- CORRECT (tying fire doors open prevents them from closing)
All three are things you must NEVER do to fire doors. Select all.

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically

  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

Q5 correct -- now Q6/14. This is a drag-and-drop matching question.
Q6: "ORDNEN SIE DIE BRENNBAREN STOFFE DEN ENTSPRECHENDEN BRANDKLASSEN ZU."
From the training content:
- A = Verbrennung mit Glutbildung (solids - wood, paper, textiles)
- B = Brände flüssiger oder flüssig werdender Stoffe (liquids)
- C = Brände von Gasen (gases)
- D = Brennbare Metalle (metals)
- F = Brände von Speiseölen und -fetten (cooking fats/oils)
I need to drag each yellow item to the correct drop zone next to its fire class. Let me figure out the coordinates.
# Find draggable items positions
$ # Get positions of draggable items and drop targets
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      var t = el.textContent.trim();
      // Look for the draggable items and drop zones
      if ((t.includes('Brennbare Metalle') || t.includes('Verbrennung mit') || t.includes('Brände von Gas') 
           || t.includes('flüssiger') || t.includes('Speiseöl'))
          && el.children.length <= 2 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300) {
        r.push('DRAG: ' + t.substring(0,40) + ' x=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Find drop zone positions
$ # Find the drop zone positions next to each fire class icon (A, B, C, D, F)
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {
    if (el.offsetWidth > 0) {
      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      // The drop zones are the empty areas to the right of the fire class icons
      // They should be around x=700-900 area
      if (rect.x > 600 && rect.width > 100 && rect.width < 300 && rect.height > 20 && rect.height < 60) {
        r.push('DROP: x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' cx=' + Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2) + ' cy=' + Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + ' text=' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,20));
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n') || 'none found';
})()"

# Map right side elements
$ # Look at broader range of elements on the right side of the quiz
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var all = doc.querySelectorAll('*');
  var r = [];
  for (var el of all) {

      var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();

        r.push('x=' + Math.round(rect.x) + ' y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' w=' + Math.round(rect.width) + ' h=' + Math.round(rect.height) + ' tag=' + el.tagName + '#' + el.id.substring(0,20) + ' text=\"' + el.textContent.trim().substring(0,30) + '\"');
      }
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"

# Get full answer texts
$ # Get the full answer text for each option
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  // The answer text is in the slide's body text, ordered vertically
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  var lines = text.split('\\n').filter(function(l){ return l.includes('Mischungsverhältnis'); });
  return lines.join('\\n');
})()"
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Zündquelle und 
Das richtige Mischungsverhältnis von Brennstoff, Katalysator und

# Get complete multi-line answer texts
$ # Get the complete answers by looking at multi-line text near each input
gsd-browser eval "(function(){
  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var text = doc.body.innerText;
  // Find all lines with the answer content
  var lines = text.split('\\n');
  var answers = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
    if (lines[i].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
      var full = lines[i].trim();
      // Check next line for continuation
      if (i+1 < lines.length && lines[i+1].trim().length > 2 && !lines[i+1].includes('Mischungsverhältnis')) {
        full += ' ' + lines[i+1].trim();
      }
      answers.push(full);
    }
  }
  return answers.join('\\n---\\n');
})()"

  var iframe = document.querySelector('iframe[src*=\"icontent.do\"]');
  var doc = iframe.contentDocument;
  var inputs = doc.querySelectorAll('input[id^=\"acc-\"]');
  var r = [];
  for (var inp of inputs) {
    var rect = inp.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (rect.width > 200 && rect.y > 200) {
      r.push('y=' + Math.round(rect.y) + ' id=' + inp.id);
    }
  }
  return r.join('\\n');
})()"
